title: aster adustus
intro: Aster adustus, also known as prairie aster, is a perennial wildflower native to the prairies of North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and demulcent properties. Aster adustus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe coughs and alleviate cold symptoms.
